title: Add support for multiple simultaneous translation backends
acceptance: Support DeepL API as alternative backend
notes: Enables users to choose preferred translation service

title: Add configuration file support for persistent settings
acceptance: Config file path via CLI or environment variable
API keys stored securely in config

title: Add progress indicators for long-running operations
notes: Improves UX for large batch operations

title: Add automatic retry logic for transient failures
acceptance: Dead letter queue for failed translations

title: Add translation caching to avoid redundant API calls
notes: Reduces API costs and improves speed
